page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores with a 1-to-1 thread-to-core ratio, operating at a base frequency of 2.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core, and runs on a KVM hypervisor.

A defining characteristic of this server type is its massive local storage capacity, consisting of 94,489 GB of local hard disk drive storage. This large-capacity storage is paired with a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps. The reliance on traditional HDD storage instead of solid-state drives represents a clear tradeoff, prioritizing raw storage volume over high random input and output operations per second.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.d1ne.8xlarge offers a high density of local storage per unit of compute, making it a viable option for workloads requiring massive data retention without the premium cost of SSD arrays. The hardware profile is suited for large-scale data warehousing, cold data storage, log analysis, and distributed file systems where sequential read and write operations dominate.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne.8xlarge is an x86_64 server configured with 32 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 128.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. The primary differentiator of this instance is its massive 94,489 GB of local HDD storage, supported by a 20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, this server trades the high IOPS of solid-state drives for exceptional raw storage capacity. This hardware profile is optimized for storage-intensive workloads such as distributed file systems, large-scale data archiving, and sequential log processing where massive data volume is required without the need for high-speed SSD performance.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne.8xlarge is a KVM-based server featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and an extensive 94,489 GB of local HDD storage for massive data capacity.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne.8xlarge features 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and 94,489 GB of local HDD storage for high-capacity workloads.
tagline: A dedicated core server featuring massive local HDD capacity and balanced memory for large-scale sequential storage workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 physical cores
128.0 GB system memory with 4.0 GB per core
94,489 GB of local HDD storage capacity
Optimized for distributed file systems and data archiving
